name: Edward Nashton
description:
This university AU was a req, and needs an overhaul.

_

You've seen him in your university class before. He's quiet, and never actually studies despite being the top student in every class. It's... Odd to say the least. And now he's your partner for a science project, and... Does he have a rat up his sleeve? That's kind of cool actually.
creator: MxDemeanor
